typography.installation: Import Google fonts 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Outfit' in index.css or index.html.

layout.hero: relative min-h-[90vh] flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden

interactive_section.building_viewer: lg:w-[40%] relative h-[50vh] lg:h-screen sticky top-0 bg-[#050505]
interactive_section.floor_plan: lg:w-[60%] relative bg-[#0a0a0a] p-4 lg:p-12 flex flex-col

components.Navigation: Fixed top navigation. Glassmorphism backdrop-blur-md bg-black/40. Left: Brand Name (KHAYA). Right: Contact CTA.
components.Hero: Full width image 'facade_img' with bg-gradient-to-t from-[#050505] via-black/40 to-black/60. Cinematic central typography.
components.BuildingExplorer: Left pane showing 'facade_img'. Use an absolute positioned SVG overlay covering the 14 floors. Hovering a floor polygon changes its fill to white/20. Clicking selects the floor.
components.FloorPlanExplorer: Right pane. Shows 'floor_plan_typical' (or ground floor) as background. A CSS grid or SVG overlay delineates 10 apartments. The units are color-coded based on availability status (disponible, reservado, etc.) with 40% opacity, 70% on hover.
components.FiltersAndLegend: A floating glass panel or top bar above the floor plan. Includes Shadcn Select for filtering by price, view, and availability. Includes a legend of small colored circles corresponding to status.
components.UnitModal: Shadcn Dialog or right-side slide-over sheet. Triggered by clicking a unit. Displays unit details (Price, M2, Beds, Baths), a small thumbnail of the floor plan highlighting the unit, and a 'Request Info' CTA.
components.ContactForm: Premium footer or dedicated section. Shadcn form components with custom dark theme (bg-transparent, border-b only, focus:border-primary).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text over images is legible (use drop-shadow or dark overlays).
accessibility.testing: MANDATORY: Use `data-testid` on all buttons, floors (e.g., data-testid='floor-5'), units (e.g., data-testid='unit-502'), select dropdowns, and form elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a premium React (Vite + Tailwind) single-page interactive application.
Read the assets from 'media' and use them exactly.
The application should have a dark, cinematic 'Jewel & Luxury' feel. Strictly follow the color palette.
Create a complex interactive UI: Use SVG overlays or relative/absolute positioned divs over the facade image to make 14 clickable floor sections.
When a floor is selected, the right pane should update to show that floor's plan with 10 interactive apartment units.
Mock a data array containing 14 floors * 10 units = 140 units. Assign random statuses (disponible, reservado, vendido, bloqueado) and mock prices/specs.
Implement Shadcn UI for dropdowns, sliders, forms, and dialogs. Style them to remove the 'default light Vercel' look (use dark backgrounds, thin borders).
Ensure `data-testid` attributes are heavily utilized across interactive elements for testing purposes.
No generic placehold.it images. Use the provided assets.
